testcase.name: Comprehensive Sales Trip E2E › multi-bill trip is traceable and blocked by the verification gate
UAT Full Loop E2E › 1. SALES creates a traceable SO draft
UAT Full Loop E2E › 2. MANAGER verifies and ADMIN confirms the SO
UAT Full Loop E2E › 3. COUNTER SALES sees the real TruckScale health state
testcase.system-err: [browser:console] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 (Internal Server Error) [browser:console] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 (Internal Server Error)

testcase.name: UAT Full Loop E2E › 4. WAREHOUSE picks, loads and ships the SO
UAT Full Loop E2E › 5. ADMIN verifies SHIPPED state and audit trail in Paper Trail
WS-Sale-App V1.0 role navigation › ADMIN can login, use Access As and return to ADMIN
WS-Sale-App V1.0 role navigation › SALES can access Quotation
WS-Sale-App V1.0 role navigation › COUNTER_SALES can access TruckScale with explicit health
testcase.system-err: [browser:console] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 (Internal Server Error) [browser:console] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500 (Internal Server Error)

testcase.name: WS-Sale-App V1.0 role navigation › WAREHOUSE can access loading and scale queues
